docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AFANADOR, SERGIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARRIAGA, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AFANADOR, SERGIO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, *TERMS/OTHER ORDERS: FOR RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT NO PROOF OR CALCULATION OF OTHER DAMAGES WAS PRESENTED RELATED TO ACTION OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM, DAVID HUARD FILED BY ARRIAGA, GLORIA AFANADOR, SERGIO
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARRIAGA, GLORIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2009 BY PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ARRIAGA, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT AFANADOR, SERGIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-15-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE INVALID PER THE COURT.(POS BOX(S) NOT CHECKED-PERSONAL SERVICE OR SUB SERVICE.) PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR WITH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: PATRICK STREB. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AFANADOR, SERGIO HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY SERGIO AFANADOR IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE FIRST OF EVERY MONTH BEGINNING AUGUST 1, 2009 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID.
